name: AWS Certified Solutions Architect – Professional (SAP-C02)
description: Professional-level certification for experienced solutions architects designing complex, multi-tier applications on AWS. Validates advanced technical skills in designing for organizational complexity. 2+ years hands-on experience. 75 questions, 180 minutes, 750/1000 passing score.
exportIntroQuestions:
## About this document

This document is a collection of practice exam questions for the **AWS Certified Solutions Architect – Professional (SAP-C02)** certification. The questions were selected because they represent complex, multi-service architectural scenarios commonly encountered when designing enterprise-scale solutions on AWS.

### Certification context

This certification validates advanced ability to design and evaluate complex AWS architectures, including topics such as:

* Designing for organizational complexity (multi-account, hybrid, multi-region)
* Architecting network connectivity strategies and security controls at scale
* Designing deployment strategies for business continuity and disaster recovery
* Migrating and modernizing existing workloads to AWS
* Continuously improving operational excellence, performance, and cost efficiency

### About the questions

Each question in this document is independent and should be analyzed as a standalone scenario. Practice exams intentionally present isolated situations, and questions may appear in any order during the actual certification exam. Information from one question should never be assumed to apply to another.

For each scenario, this document includes:

* The original practice exam question.
* An explanation of the architectural reasoning behind the correct answer.
* A discussion of why the remaining options are less appropriate for the stated requirements.

### Learning objective

The primary goal of this material is to develop advanced architectural reasoning rather than memorization. The focus should be on understanding the complex business constraints and technical requirements presented in each scenario, evaluating trade-offs between multiple valid approaches, and identifying the solution that best balances all stated requirements.

By studying the decision-making process behind each answer, readers can build the advanced analytical skills expected for the AWS Professional-level certification exam.
exportIntroTranscripts:
## About this document

This document contains technical summaries of lesson transcripts related to the **AWS Certified Solutions Architect – Professional (SAP-C02)** certification.

### Purpose
Organizes and synthesizes lesson content in a structured format for quick review and deeper understanding of the concepts presented.
exportIntroChat:
## About this document

This document contains AI study conversations related to the **AWS Certified Solutions Architect – Professional (SAP-C02)** certification.

### Purpose
Records discussions and explanations generated during interactive AI study sessions, serving as complementary reference material.

domains.name: Design Solutions for Organizational Complexity
domains.description: Domain 1 (26%): Architect network connectivity strategies (hybrid, multi-region), design multi-account AWS environments, prescribe security controls.

domains.name: Design for New Solutions
domains.description: Domain 2 (29%): Design deployment strategies for business requirements, design solutions for business continuity, determine security controls for new solutions.

domains.name: Continuous Improvement for Existing Solutions
domains.description: Domain 3 (25%): Determine strategy to improve overall operational excellence, improve deployment strategy, improve reliability, improve performance, improve security.

domains.name: Accelerate Workload Migration and Modernization
domains.description: Domain 4 (20%): Select existing workloads for migration, determine optimal migration approach, determine new architecture for modernization.
